title: Context Window Packer — Fit the Best Context Into N Tokens
tagline: Inkling just shipped a 1M-token window — but you still can't afford to fill it with junk. Paste your sources, set a token budget, and watch a 0/1-knapsack packer choose the highest-value context that fits.
description: Client-side context optimizer: BM25 relevance + real tokenizer + a from-scratch 0/1-knapsack packer that beats naive truncation. Day 12 of kb-daily-builds.
